title: canarium littorale f. rufum
intro: Canarium littorale f. rufum, also known as the Rufous Beach Almond, is a variety of the Canarium littorale tree, native to the tropical regions of the Indo-Pacific. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The Rufous Beach Almond is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, offering several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions.
